extraction.one_line_summary: CAICEDO Jonathan Klever won from the break on Etna after YATES Simon cracked 8km from the summit, losing significant time.
tactical_patterns: SCOTSON Miles worked early for YATES Simon before 20km to go, suggesting team miscalculated his form or summit difficulty.
Experienced climbers NIBALI Vincenzo, FUGLSANG Jakob, MAJKA Rafał formed cohesive chase group finishing 55s back, exposing pure climber weakness.
GANNA Filippo sacrificed GC by dropping back to pace THOMAS Geraint pre-climb, revealing Ineos prioritized Thomas over their own climbers.

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: crashed in neutral zone then dropped before Etna climb even started, catastrophic GC loss on opening summit finish
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: cracked 8km from summit despite teammate SCOTSON working early, form concerns amplified by losing time to veteran group
rider_signals.CAICEDO Jonathan Klever: positive: first win outside Ecuador came on major Giro summit finish from breakaway, suggests underrated climbing capacity
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: took maglia rosa finishing ahead of experienced climber group, significant overperformance for young rider on Etna
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: neutral: dropped back for THOMAS domestique work, sacrificing own GC but confirming time trial specialists can't compete on summit finishes
